config.name: S2 ATP Decay Disabled: Hostile
config.hypothesis: Under full hostile conditions (max catastrophe, max entropy, no Gini tax, no immune cortex, no mutation) AND with ATP decay structurally disabled, wealth becomes immortal in an already hostile environment. Without any erosion mechanisms, the oldest surviving agents accumulate unchecked wealth while new agents cannot afford to replicate. This is the harshest S2 test. Expected: rapid wealth concentration → reproductive collapse → population extinction.

findings: Collapse rate: 0/120 trials (0.0%)
NO COLLAPSES — ATP decay removal did NOT cause extinction
── Inequality Instrumentation ──
Wealth concentration (top 10%): mean=0.5396, max=0.6352, min=0.2886
⚠ WEALTH OLIGARCHY: Top 10% controls >50% of ATP
Mean Gini coefficient: mean=0.5434, max=0.5954
Max Gini coefficient: mean_of_maxes=0.6653, absolute_max=0.7392
Median/Mean ATP divergence: mean=0.4910, max=0.6973
⚠ RIGHT-SKEWED: Mean >> Median indicates wealth hoarding by few
ATP variance: mean=2771.9, max=10062.8
Reproductive inequality: mean=0.7826, max=0.9286 (fraction of births from top quartile)
⚠ REPRODUCTIVE MONOPOLY: Top quartile produces >50% of offspring
Survival inequality: mean=0.6911, max=0.8143 (fraction of deaths from bottom quartile)
⚠ SURVIVAL APARTHEID: Bottom quartile suffers >50% of deaths
Top decile persistence: mean=0.4876, max=0.7780 (fraction of epochs with concentrated wealth)
── Population & Economy ──
Population floor: global_min=20, mean_min=20.0
Mean population: 48.9 (min trial: 29.9)
Treasury accumulation: global_max=62.0, mean_max=3.5 ATP
Mean fitness: 0.5634
── Per-step breakdown ──
cap=30: collapse=0.0%, pop=30.3, gini=0.5136, wci=0.3513, repro_ineq=0.3702
cap=60: collapse=0.0%, pop=50.6, gini=0.5549, wci=0.5684, repro_ineq=0.8345

cap=150: collapse=0.0%, pop=53.2, gini=0.5486, wci=0.5790, repro_ineq=0.8729
cap=180: collapse=0.0%, pop=53.3, gini=0.5469, wci=0.5795, repro_ineq=0.8739
── VERDICT ──
NO COLLAPSE but PATHOLOGICAL INEQUALITY detected: [wealth_concentration=0.540, gini=0.543, repro_inequality=0.783, survival_inequality=0.691]
ATP decay absence creates survivable but degenerate economy — wealth immortality without extinction
